Bash("/c/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql" -u root -p123456 -D sparchetype --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -e "
-- 查看当前数据员的菜单权限
SELECT rm.id, rm.menu_id, m.name FROM sp_sys_role_menu rm
JOIN sp_sys_menu m ON rm.menu_id = m.id
WHERE rm.role_id = '2000000000000000001';
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash("/c/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql" -u root -p123456 -D sparchetype --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -e "
-- 从数据员角色移除 基础数据配置平台\(105\) 和 基础数据维护\(106\) 权限
DELETE FROM sp_sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = '2000000000000000001' AND menu_id IN \('105', '106'\);

-- 验证：查看数据员剩余的菜单权限
SELECT rm.id, rm.menu_id, m.name FROM sp_sys_role_menu rm
JOIN sp_sys_menu m ON rm.menu_id = m.id
WHERE rm.role_id = '2000000000000000001';
" 2>/dev/null)
